chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt.Petition No.D-1346 of 2015. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For non prosecution of M.A.No.4391/2016. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.05.2023 Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl.A.G for petitioner. Mr. Habibullah Ghouri, Advocate for legal heirs of missing boy Sahil. =*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*= At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the legal heirs of missing boy Sahil that his clients are not in contact with him since long; however, he would be satisfied, if this Suo-moto petition for recovery of missing boy Sahil is kept on dormant file with direction to police to submit quarterly progress report in office, which is not opposed by learned Addl.A.G Sindh. It is ordered accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
